info.name: X2Mail
info.summary: Webmail with native OAuth2 SSO — zero extra passwords
info.author: NK-IT Dev
info.description:
**X2Mail** — Webmail for Nextcloud with zero-login SSO.
Log into Nextcloud via Keycloak or any OIDC provider, open Email — done. No extra passwords, no extra login forms. Your OIDC access token authenticates directly against the IMAP server via OAuth2 (OAUTHBEARER/XOAUTH2).
### Key Features - **SSO Webmail** — Keycloak, Authentik, any OIDC provider → IMAP without credentials - **OAuth2 IMAP auth** — OAUTHBEARER + XOAUTH2 auto-detected - **Automatic token refresh** — seamless sessions via user_oidc TokenService - **Admin Panel via SSO** — NC admin = engine admin, no separate password - **Setup Wizard** — preflight checks for IMAP, SMTP, OIDC + JWT token diagnostics - **NC33 native theme** — light + dark mode - **Sieve filtering** — server-side mail rules - **Multiple identities** — manage sender aliases - **Nextcloud integration** — Contacts, Files, Calendar - **OpenPGP / S/MIME** encryption - **CLI tools** — `occ x2mail:setup`, `occ x2mail:status` - **Password auth fallback** — legacy support when SSO unavailable
### Setup ``` occ x2mail:setup --imap-host mail.example.com --domain example.com --sieve ``` SSO is the default. The setup wizard verifies connectivity, OIDC config, and decodes your JWT token to check email claim and audience.
### Requirements - Nextcloud 33+, PHP 8.4+ - IMAP server with OAUTHBEARER (Dovecot 2.4+) - OIDC provider (Keycloak, Authentik, etc.) + `user_oidc`
